ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Black pepper cashews (317%) (_cashew nuts_, black pepper seasoning (6%) (sea salt, black pepper, rice flour, maltodextrin, sugar, lemon juice powder, natural flavouring), tapioca starch), edamame beans (31%) (edamame beans (_soya_), salt), salted coated pea (23%) (green peas, corn starch, _wheat_ flour, sunflower oil, sugar, sea salt), salted broad beans (15%) (broad beans, sunflower oil, sea salt)
product_name: Sea Salt & Pepper Veggie & Nut Power
